log_d1.name: RESEARCH JOURNAL
log_d1.description:
RESEARCH JOURNAL
Dr. Elena Vasquez
GeneTech Corp - Project Lazarus

Day 1 of the project.

I have been entrusted with something extraordinary.
The Lazarus serum could revolutionize medicine.
Real-time cell regeneration.
No more cancer. No more permanent injuries.
Immortality within reach.

I cannot fail.
The government is counting on me.
Humanity is counting on me.

Note: Initial cell tests
show a 300% faster division rate.
Promising.

- E.V.

log_d45.name: RESEARCH JOURNAL - DAY 45
log_d45.description:
Dr. Elena Vasquez

The rats in Group B are exhibiting
abnormal behavior.
Aggression toward other subjects.
Insensitivity to pain.
A... disturbing appetite.

I reported these anomalies to the committee.
They told me to continue.
“The benefits outweigh the risks.”

I'm not sure I agree.

Personal note: I had nightmares last night. The rats were staring at me.
They were smiling.

That's ridiculous. Rats don't smile.

- E.V.

log_d120.name: RESEARCH JOURNAL - DAY 120
log_d120.description:
CLASSIFIED - ■■■■■■■■■■

I was forced to proceed with human trials.
The ethics committee was... bypassed.
Prisoners. Sentenced to death.

“They're already dead anyway.”
That's what they told me.

Subjects #1 through #■■: Partial success.
Functional regeneration.
But the behavioral changes persist.
They’re becoming… different.

Subject #7—Marcus Cole.
Special case.
Perfect regeneration.
But something’s wrong with his eyes.

I should have stopped.

—E.V.

log_d150.name: RESEARCH LOG - DAY 150
log_d150.description:
■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

Marcus has escaped.

How? The cells were reinforced.
The guards... they're dead.
Torn to pieces.

He infected three employees before fleeing.
The virus... it spreads through bites.
Through blood.
Through saliva.

What have I done?
What have WE done?

Containment protocol activated.
But I know it’s too late.

Marcus is out there.
And he’s not Marcus anymore.

I’m sorry.

- E.V.

final_report.name: FINAL REPORT
final_report.description:
Dr. Elena Vasquez
Date: ■■■■■■■■■■

To whoever finds this:

There is no cure.
I tried. For weeks.
The virus mutates too quickly.

But I found something.
The antibodies from Patient Zero.
Marcus Cole.

If you can find him...
If you can extract his blood...
There may still be hope.

He is out there somewhere.
More human than the others.
But infinitely more dangerous.

I won’t be here when you read this.
The infection is spreading.
I refuse to become one of them.

I’m sorry.

Dr. Elena Vasquez

[Rest of document stained with blood]

autopsy_doc.name: AUTOPSY REPORT #■■■
autopsy_doc.description:
Medical Examiner: Dr. Thomas Chen
Subject: Dr. David Foster, male, 33 years old
Cause of death: Multiple bite wounds

OBSERVATIONS:
- Bite marks on arms and neck
- Visible infection: blackened veins
- Eyes: discolored irises (gray)
- Body temperature: abnormally high
- ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■
- ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■
- ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

POST-MORTEM:
The subject rose to his feet after 4 hours.
No vital signs but motor activity.
Immediate aggressive behavior.
Subject neutralized.

CONCLUSION:
This is not a normal disease.
The dead do not stay dead.

Recommendation: BURN THE BODIES.

Note: I am stopping the autopsies.
It is too dangerous.
Farewell, David.

- Dr. Chen

rodriguez_journal.name: Personal Journal
rodriguez_journal.description:
Mike Rodriguez, Lab Technician

I knew something was wrong.
The scientists were scared.
Even Dr. Vasquez.

The day Marcus escaped, I was there.
I saw him.
He wasn’t running.
He was walking. Calmly.
As if he knew exactly where to go.

The guards fired.
The bullets didn’t stop him.
He looked at them. And he smiled.

Not a human smile.
Something… satisfied.

I hid.
That’s why I’m still alive.

But sometimes, at night, I swear
I hear footsteps in the corridor.
Slow footsteps. Deliberate.

He knows where I am.
He’s just waiting for the right moment.

vaccine_tld_v1.name: EXPERIMENTAL VACCINE TLD-V1
vaccine_tld_v1.description:
INCOMPLETE - DO NOT USE

Identified components:
- Patient Zero Antibody [REQUIRED]
- Neural Extract [OBTAINED]
- Stabilizer [OBTAINED]
- Catalyst [MISSING]
- ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■ [OBTAINED]
- ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■ [MISSING]
- ■■■■■■■■■ [MISSING]

PROCEDURE:
1. Obtain fresh blood from Patient Zero
2. Isolate specific antibodies
3. Combine with stabilizer
4. Add unknown catalyst
5. Administer intravenously with a syringe

PROBLEM:
Patient Zero missing.
Searches impossible.

STATUS: ABANDONED

patient_zero.name: FILE: PATIENT ZERO
patient_zero.description:
CLASSIFICATION: ABOVE TOP SECRET

NAME: Marcus Cole
AGE: 34
PRE-INFECTION STATUS: Prisoner
CRIME: Murder (double homicide)
PROFILE: Diagnosed psychopath

SELECTION FOR PROJECT LAZARUS:
“Ideal subject. No family.
No one will look for him.”

TREATMENT RESULTS:
- Regeneration: PERFECT
- Side Effects: AMPLIFIED
- Intelligence: PRESERVED (abnormal)
- Aggression: EXTREME

NOTE FROM Dr. VASQUEZ:
“Marcus is different from the others.
He thinks. He plans.
It’s as if the virus had...
perfected him rather than destroyed him.”

CURRENT STATUS: ON THE RUN
LAST KNOWN LOCATION: ■■■■■■■■■■

DANGER: MAXIMUM
APPROACH: NOT RECOMMENDED

Note : ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■
■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■
■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

enzymatic_catalyst.description: An enzymatic catalyst for the production of the experimental TLD-V1 vaccine

chlorhexidine_bottle.description: A bottle of chlorhexidine for disinfecting a wound

recorder_fragment_a.name: Recorder Fragment A
recorder_fragment_a.description:
AUDIO LOG FRAGMENT A - LAB ANNEX
Speaker: Dr. Elena Vasquez

"If anyone hears this, this is not a cure log.
The TLD-V1 protocol is incomplete and unstable.
Patient Zero blood is mandatory for antibody isolation.
Without it, every branch fails at stage three.

The subject escaped containment and reached the surface.
Recovery teams reported mass casualties and then went dark.
No confirmed sample retrieval.

If you are still inside the facility, do not attempt final synthesis.
Preserve the notes. Seal the rooms. Survive as long as you can."

recorder_fragment_b.name: Recorder Fragment B
recorder_fragment_b.description:
AUDIO LOG FRAGMENT B - SECURITY CHANNEL
Speaker: Captain R. Heller

"Perimeter collapse confirmed.
Subject Marcus Cole breached outer doors and moved topside.
Civilian casualties reported in multiple sectors.
Engagement units failed to contain.

Inside the lab: guards and researchers are non-responsive, infected, or armed against themselves.
Several staff chose self-termination rather than transformation.
Others were neutralized after turning.

If you are hearing this, assume total internal loss of personnel.
Do not expect rescue."

recorder_fragment_c.name: Recorder Fragment C
recorder_fragment_c.description:
AUDIO LOG FRAGMENT C - PERSONAL FILE
Speaker: Dr. Elena Vasquez

"I am recording this before I take my life.
The infection progresses too fast. I will not become one of them.

To the survivors who will come after me: if you are hearing this, you are alone.
No guards. No team. No command.
Only records, blood, and consequences.

The elevator code is preserved in the office.
The vaccine file is in the lab, but it cannot be completed.
Patient Zero blood is lost to the surface.

Do not chase hope where none remains.
Leave the truth.
I am sorry."
